title: carex × tenelliformis
intro: Carex × tenelliformis, also known as variegated sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Carex genus, characterized by its distinctive and attractive foliage. Carex × tenelliformis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and support immune system function. Carex × tenelliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
